name: Analyst role cannot trigger a scan
statusMessage:
XFAIL RBAC bypass - analyst can create/trigger resources (/assets, /findings, /scans) (see issue #5)

AssertionError: assert 200 == <HTTPStatus.FORBIDDEN: 403>
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.FORBIDDEN: 403> = HTTPStatus.FORBIDDEN
